features.title: Dashboard Widgets
features.description: Configurable dashboard with drag-and-drop widget grid. Widgets include: commit activity chart, PR status summary, build health indicator, and team velocity graph.

features.title: GitHub Integration
features.description: Connect to GitHub API for repository data. Pull commits, PRs, issues, and actions status. Support multiple repositories per workspace.

features.title: Dark Mode Theme
features.description: System-aware dark mode with manual toggle. Apply across all components including charts and code snippets.
